sequences.description: Horizontal carousel with 5 product promotional images showing Memorial Day Sale tiers and individual product savings, each slide linked with descriptive heading, pagination dots and navigation arrows
sequences.reason: Interactive carousel component with multiple slides, navigation controls, and auto-play requires structured block decoration. Matches carousel block pattern with image + linked heading per slide.
sequences.variantDecision: REUSE (75% similarity - same structure: image + linked heading per slide, same colorScheme/density/imagePattern)
sequences.notes: Reusing carousel-category variant from homepage. Same structural pattern despite different purpose (sale highlights vs category navigation).

sequences.description: Centered heading 'Plus, Shop Additional Savings', subheading 'On select Memorial Day markdown items', CTA button 'Don't Miss Out' on red promotional background image
sequences.reason: CTA with background image styling requires block structure. The existing call-to-action-promo variant does not support background images per its metadata. Created new variant with background-image support.
sequences.variantDecision: CREATE NEW (10% similarity to call-to-action-promo - different colorScheme, density, imagePattern)
sequences.notes: New variant created. Has red background image unlike call-to-action-promo. Heading + subheading + single CTA button pattern.

sequences.description: Product carousel with heading 'Shop Living Room Savings' and horizontal scrollable product grid with navigation arrows, followed by separator
sequences.reason: Commerce-integrated product carousel that dynamically loads product data with swiper navigation. No existing variant for this commerce-specific carousel pattern.
sequences.notes: New variant created for commerce product carousels. Includes heading area and product grid with carousel navigation. Used across sections 3, 4, and 5.

sequences.description: Product carousel with heading 'Shop Dining Room Savings' and horizontal scrollable product grid with navigation arrows, followed by separator
sequences.reason: Same commerce-integrated product carousel pattern as Section 3, displaying dining room category products.
sequences.notes: Same block variant as Section 3. Different product category data but identical visual and structural pattern.

sequences.description: Product carousel with heading 'Shop Bedroom Savings' and horizontal scrollable product grid with navigation arrows
sequences.reason: Same commerce-integrated product carousel pattern as Sections 3 and 4, displaying bedroom category products.
sequences.variantDecision: REUSE product-carousel-sale (same variant as Sections 3 and 4)
sequences.notes: Same block variant. No separator after this instance (last in the series).

sequences.description: Split layout with large mattress image on left and text content on right: heading 'Memorial Day Mattress Sale', descriptive paragraph, two CTA buttons ('Shop Tempur-Pedic' and 'Shop All Mattress Brands')
sequences.reason: Split layout with image and text/CTAs matches the commerce-teaser pattern. The existing commerce-teaser-split variant handles this exact layout with image + heading + description + multiple CTAs.
sequences.variantDecision: REUSE (72% similarity - same density, purpose, imagePattern; different colorScheme)
sequences.notes: Reusing commerce-teaser-split from homepage. Source HTML uses 'featured-right' and 'textAlignment-left' classes.

sequences.description: SEO paragraph with bold 'Sale' heading and descriptive text about Havertys furniture deals with inline links to product categories
sequences.reason: Author can type a heading and paragraph with inline links normally in Word/Google Docs. No special structure needed.
sequences.notes: Source uses hvt-text block but content is simple heading + paragraph with links - default content in EDS.

sequences.description: Legal disclaimer text fragment with Memorial Day Sale terms/conditions and financing details
sequences.reason: Legal disclaimers are reusable content that should be maintained as fragments to ensure consistency across pages. Source HTML uses fragment wrapper.
sequences.variantDecision: USE BASE (fragment is a structural reference block - no variants needed)
sequences.notes: Renders as a fragment reference to a shared legal disclaimer. Content includes Memorial Day Sale terms and 60-month financing details.

carousel-category.description: Rotating image/content displays with slide navigation for category/product highlights
carousel-category.structure: Each slide = 1 row with image + optional text content

call-to-action-sale.description: Promotional CTA banner with background image support for sale events
call-to-action-sale.structure: Background image + heading + subheading + CTA button

product-carousel-sale.description: Commerce-integrated product carousel with dynamic product loading for sale categories
product-carousel-sale.structure: Title row + product data source/configuration + carousel navigation

commerce-teaser-split.description: Promotional teaser with split media/text layout for featured products
commerce-teaser-split.structure: Image column + text column (heading + description + CTAs)

fragment.structure: Single row with path to fragment document

section2.reason: The background image provides a section container context rather than block-specific design. The call-to-action block itself does not inherently have backgrounds; the red background is section-level promotional styling.
